title: Azerbaijan reveals banks’ rankings based on interest revenues for 1Q2026
description: Azerbaijan's Central Bank reveals the latest ranking of banks operating in the country based on the volume of interest revenues.

title: State police add to trove of body cam footage from South Burlington ICE operation
description: Public Safety Commissioner says VSP did not violate use of force policies.

title: KERC approves APR true-up; consumers to see bill adjustments from May across Karnataka
description: KERC approves a true-up, increasing electricity bills by 56 paise per unit from May 2026 for Karnataka consumers.

title: UK tech salaries rise 8-20% as demand for AI and data specialists grows
description: UK AI and data salaries rose 8-20% in 2025, with senior research science roles reaching £181,000, per Xcede's 2026 UK Salary Guide. Job postings requiring AI skills jumped 70% year-on-year, even as entry-level hiring fell sharply.

title: Fishing guides brace for low water levels, warm temps after dry winter
description: “Devastating,” “worrying” and “unsettling” — that’s just some of the vocabulary used by guides regarding the upcoming fishing season on the Yampa and other local rivers. The rivers are fed by winter snowpack. But this...

title: Quota bill defeat: NDA nationwide stir against Oppn from Saturday
description: In a swift political counter-offensive, the Bharatiya Janata Party and its National Democratic Alliance (NDA) partners have announced a massive, nationwide protest campaign targeting the Opposition.

title: Georgian Bluffs going to cart-based waste and organics collection
description: Bag tags no longer required after automatic cart-based system implemented
